narrative: The CV-screening platform is classified high-risk under Annex III §4(a) and underwent Module H1 conformity assessment with a notified body, with CE marking affixed and the EU declaration of conformity dated 2026-02-11. Annex IV technical documentation is maintained as a living file and includes the Art 9 risk management plan, Art 10 data governance statement covering representativeness across protected characteristics, and the Art 13 instructions for use distributed to deploying employers. Human oversight per Art 14 is implemented through a mandatory human-in-the-loop reviewer for every rejected candidate, with override authority and training records. System logs are retained 12 months exceeding the Art 12 six-month floor. The AIMS is certified to ISO/IEC 42001:2023, with the AI policy signed by the CEO. Post-market monitoring runs quarterly drift and disparity audits, and a 15-day serious-incident reporting channel to the national market surveillance authority is operational. A FRIA was published prior to public-sector pilot.
